title: Report Engine y contrato de evidencias
reason_no_adr: El sprint implementa una capacidad prevista en el backlog sin cambiar arquitectura, seguridad, persistencia, costos, agentes ni APIs externas.
pass_criteria: ReportEngine writes JSON and Markdown under outputs/reports
EvidenceReport includes report_id, command, status, exit_code, generated_at, summary and findings
readiness_check legacy report names remain available
CLI validators can write evidence with --write-report
block_criteria: Markdown evidence omits critical audit fields
ReportEngine can write outside project root
known_limitations: No cryptographic signature for evidence reports
No report retention or rotation policy
No advanced secret redaction; to be addressed by SecretGuard/Policy Engine
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-07 — Event Log JSONL y observabilidad local
